sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Potentially Suspicious Desktop Background Change Via Registry
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description:
Detects registry value settings that would replace the user's desktop background.
This is a common technique used by malware to change the desktop background to a ransom note or other image.
Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_category: Malware Command and Control Activity Detected
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert udp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET MALWARE Ransomware/Cerber Checkin 2"; dsize:<11; content:"hi"; depth:2; fast_pattern; pcre:"/^[a-f0-9]{7,}$/R"; threshold: type both, track by_src, count 1, seconds 60; reference:md5,ac4d7fb5739862e9914556ed5d50f84f; classtype:command-and-control; sid:2023453; rev:5; metadata:created_at 2016_03_28, former_category MALWARE, updated_at 2016_10_27;)
alert ( msg:"DECODE_ICMP_DST_UNREACH_ADMIN_PROHIBITED"; sid:441; gid:116; rev:1; metadata:rule-type decode; classtype:attempted-recon; )
alert ( msg:"DECODE_ICMP_DST_UNREACH_DST_HOST_PROHIBITED"; sid:442; gid:116; rev:1; metadata:rule-type decode; classtype:attempted-recon; )

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: SSLBL: Malicious JA3 SSL-Client Fingerprint detected (Tofsee)
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tls any any -> any any (msg:"SSLBL: Malicious JA3 SSL-Client Fingerprint detected (Tofsee)"; ja3_hash; content:"4d7a28d6f2263ed61de88ca66eb011e3"; reference:url, sslbl.abuse.ch/ja3-fingerprints/4d7a28d6f2263ed61de88ca66eb011e3/; sid:906200022; rev:1;)
